mapper.select: SELECT * FROM alert_access_list WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT * FROM alert_access_list WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0 AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_access_list (name, type, status, remark, create_time, update_time, is_delete) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE alert_access_list SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE alert_access_list SET is_delete = 1, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO alert_access_list_user (list_id, user_name, user_account) VALUES
(#{listId}, #{u.userName}, #{u.userAccount})
